permitted_uses.use_name: uses accessory to the foregoing uses

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: PART 8: RESIDENTIAL MULTIPLE DWELLING UNIT (RMU) ZONE
content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in a Residential Multiple Dwelling Unit (RMU) Zone

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: except for one or more of the following uses:

content_blocks.text: In any Residential Multiple Dwelling Unit (RMU) Zone, no development permit shall be issued

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: except in conformity with the following requirements:
content_blocks.text: Minimum Lot Area 10,000 Sq.Ft. Minimum Lot Frontage 100 Ft. Minimum Front Yard 30 Ft. Minimum Rear Yard 40 Ft. Minimum Side Yard 15 feet minimum or 1/2 the height of the building, whichever is greater Flankage Yard 30 Ft. Maximum Height of Main Building 3 Storeys (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26) Maximum Number of Dwelling Units/Lot 36 Units Lot Coverage 35% Type of Lot Area Required Dwelling Unit Per Dwelling Unit Density Bachelor, Bedsitting & One 1,500 Sq.Ft Bedroom Two or more Bedrooms 2,000 Sq.Ft. Recreation One Bedroom, Bachelor or Space Bedsitting 200 Sq.Ft Two Bedroom 575 Sq.Ft. Three Bedroom 950 Sq.Ft. Four or More Bedrooms 1,325 Sq.Ft. Where shared housing use is provided, a minimum of 500 Sq.Ft. of lot area shall be required for each bedroom, and a minimum of 200 Sq.Ft. of recreation space shall be required for each bedroom. (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) A recreational space shall be a space set aside for recreational purposes such as common recreational areas: play areas, recreational rooms, roof decks, swimming pools and tennis courts. A recreational space shall have no dimension less than thirty (30) feet and a minimum of 50 percent of the outdoor recreational space shall have grades between 0-8 percent.
